case_title: LUMINAE INC DBA LUMINAE SOUTER LIGHTING DESIGN VS PAUL VANNI LIMITED PARTNERSHIP JAY PAUL COMPANY

docket_entries.description: REQUESTED CONTINUED DATE WAS 1/5/91 PUT OVER TO 1/ 7/91 1/5 WAS SATURDAY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PAUL VANNI LIMITED PARTNERSHIP JAY PAUL COMPANY
CONTINUANCE REQUEST 11/27/90 GRANTED 01/07/91 HEAR ING DATE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUMINAE INC DBA LUMINAE SOUTER LIGHTING DESIGN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAUL VANNI LIMITED PARTNERSHIP JAY PAUL COMPANY $1,027.84 PRINCIPAL, $16.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,043.84 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
